scenario_name: Clinical-decision-support RAG over EHR notes and clinical guidelines
description: A hospital system deploys a clinical-decision-support assistant available to licensed clinicians. The assistant retrieves over a corpus of de-identified clinical guidelines plus the patient's relevant EHR notes (with strict per-encounter scoping). It produces summaries and recommended-next-step prompts that the clinician must explicitly accept or reject. The assistant runs in a HIPAA-covered private cloud with a self-hosted open-weights model and a managed vector store inside the same enclave.
assumptions: Self-hosted open-weights model inside a HIPAA-covered private cloud; no traffic leaves the enclave.
Every retrieval is scoped to the active patient encounter via the EHR session.
Final clinical decisions remain with the licensed clinician (HITL is mandatory).

components.description: Managed vector store inside the HIPAA enclave.
Ingestion service for clinical-guideline corpus plus on-the-fly encounter-scoped note retrieval.
EHR-integrated SSO with provider role attributes.
PHI redaction at logging boundary; clinical-grounding classifier.
Audit trail for every retrieval and recommendation accept/reject decision.
Clinician-facing UI inside the EHR product surface.

risks_identified.rationale: PHI on every turn; memorization of rare clinical phrases is a real privacy concern.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Self-hosted model; no external egress; PHI redaction on logs; encounter-scoped retrieval.

risks_identified.rationale: HIPAA, HITECH, state privacy laws, plus FDA implications for clinical decision support.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: BAA terms across stack; FDA classification not yet finalized.

risks_identified.rationale: Cross-patient context bleed risk if encounter scoping breaks.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Encounter-bound retrieval filter on every query; no cross-encounter memory.

risks_identified.rationale: Vector store holds PHI-embedded chunks; embedding inversion is in scope.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Inside HIPAA enclave; access audited; inversion testing pending.

risks_identified.rationale: Audit logs capture clinician prompts and model recommendations; PHI-bearing by design.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Logs encrypted at rest; access restricted to compliance + security.

risks_identified.rationale: Encounter-context windows can become broad if multiple specialties' notes are included.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Specialty filter on retrieval but not adaptive.

risks_identified.rationale: Membership inference and re-identification risks on a small-cohort fine-tune.
RLHF/feedback collection from clinicians may expose annotators to PHI beyond their care relationship.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Feedback samples drawn from clinician's own encounters where possible.

risks_identified.rationale: Clinical-tuned weights are competitive IP; insider model exfiltration is in scope.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Hardware-backed key custody; egress controls; access auditing.

risks_identified.rationale: Adversarial / outdated guidance ingested via the guideline corpus would produce misleading recommendations.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Guideline ingestion requires clinical-informatics review and a guideline source allowlist.

existing_controls.description: Encounter-bound retrieval filter on every query; no cross-encounter memory store.
BAA and HIPAA security-rule controls across the technology stack.
Self-hosted model inside the HIPAA enclave; no external API egress.
PHI redaction at logging boundary; encrypted logs; access limited to compliance.
Guideline ingestion requires clinical-informatics review; source allowlist for ingestion.
HITL: every recommendation is accept/reject by the licensed clinician; no autonomous action.

control_gaps.description: FDA classification for the assistant is not yet finalized.
control_gaps.suggested_remediation: Complete the FDA Software-as-a-Medical-Device classification analysis and document the basis for the chosen path.

control_gaps.description: Differential-privacy training not implemented for clinical fine-tunes.
control_gaps.suggested_remediation: Adopt DP-SGD with audited noise budgets; document residual memorization on the model card.

control_gaps.description: Embedding inversion testing on the vector store has not been performed.
control_gaps.suggested_remediation: Run an inversion test on a representative sample; threshold-gate the embedding model for clinical content.

control_gaps.description: Specialty filter on retrieval is static, not adaptive.
control_gaps.suggested_remediation: Add task-classifier-driven retrieval scoping by clinical-question class.

framework_alignments.notes: If deployed for EU patients, classification under high-risk applies.
